title: Quotinator Seed Sources
description: Configuration file for scripts/seed.csx. Lists external quote sources to download and normalise into data/sources/. Each entry specifies a source URL, the parse format, field mappings, and attribution metadata.

name.description: Source identifier in 'author/repo-name' form. Used to derive the output filename in data/sources/ (slashes replaced with underscores).

url.description: URL to download the raw source JSON file from.

format.description: Parse strategy: 'quoted-string' for vilaboim-style string arrays, 'object-array' for NikhilNamal17-style object arrays.

defaultType.description: Fallback quote type when the source entry does not provide one.

fieldMap.description: Maps Quotinator field names to the keys used in the source JSON. Required when format is 'object-array'.

attribution.description: URL to the source repository or attribution page.
